info.name: CipherLearn API v1.0.1
info.description:
Comprehensive API collection for CipherLearn - Learning Management System.

This collection includes all endpoints for:
- Authentication (Login, Signup, Logout)
- Batches Management (CRUD + Danger Zone)
- Student Enrollment (Single & CSV Import + Danger Zone)
- Attendance (Manual, QR, Reports)
- Fees Management (Structures, Receipts, Summaries)
- YouTube Videos (CRUD)
- Notes (CRUD with file uploads)
- Analytics Dashboard (Stats, Trends, Distribution)
- **Student App APIs** (Mobile/Student Portal)

**New in v1.0.1:**
- Dashboard Analytics APIs (stats, enrollment trends, attendance trends)
- Batch Distribution & Recent Activities
- Danger Zone APIs for hard delete operations
- Student Profile API for QR attendance
- Fees Management System (Fee Structures, Receipts, Bulk Creation)
- Student App APIs (Profile, Dashboard, Attendance, Assignments, Announcements, Resources, Fees)

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create environment with baseUrl = http://localhost:5000/api
3. Run the Login request first to auto-set the authToken
4. For Student App APIs, login as a student user

**Base URL:** http://localhost:5000/api

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**Required fields:**
- name: Full name of the user
- email: Valid email address
- password: Minimum 6 characters with at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number

Login to get authentication token.

**Note:** The token and user role are automatically saved to environment variables after successful login.
Logout and invalidate the current session
Update the current user's profile information

item.name: Batches
item.description: Batch management endpoints for creating and managing student batches

request.description: Create a new batch for student enrollment.
Get all batches with their details
Get details of a specific batch by ID
Update an existing batch's details
Move batch(es) to draft status (soft delete)
Get all draft (soft-deleted) batches
Delete one or more batches
**DANGER ZONE:** Permanently delete a batch with ALL related data including students, attendance records, videos, and notes. This action cannot be undone!
**DANGER ZONE:** Permanently delete ALL soft-deleted batches with their related data. This action cannot be undone!
Enroll a single student into a batch.
Get all students across all batches
Get all students enrolled in a specific batch
Get details of a specific student by ID
Get the current authenticated user's student profile. Used by students for QR attendance.
Update a student's information
Soft delete a student from the system
Download a sample CSV template for bulk student import
Preview CSV data before importing
Import students from a CSV file
**DANGER ZONE:** Permanently delete a student with ALL their attendance records. This action cannot be undone!
**DANGER ZONE:** Permanently delete multiple students with ALL their attendance records. This action cannot be undone!
**DANGER ZONE:** Permanently delete ALL soft-deleted students with their attendance records. This action cannot be undone!

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Attendance management including manual marking, QR-based attendance, and reports

request.description:
Mark attendance for a single student.

**Status options:** PRESENT, ABSENT
Mark attendance for multiple students at once

Generate a QR code for a batch.

The QR code is valid for the current day only.
Check if a valid QR code exists for the batch today

Mark attendance by scanning QR code.

**Validation:**
- QR must be valid and not expired
- Student must be enrolled in the batch
- Student email must match authenticated user
Get all attendance records for a batch
Get attendance records for a batch on a specific date
Get student's attendance matrix for calendar view
Generate an attendance report for a batch within a date range
Add a new YouTube video for a batch
Get all videos with pagination
Get all videos for a specific batch
Delete a video

item.name: Notes
item.description: Notes management with file upload support

request.description: Create a new note with optional file attachments
Get all notes with pagination
Soft delete a note

item.name: Fees
item.description: Fee management including fee structures, receipts, and summaries

item.name: Fee Structures
item.description: Fee structure configuration per batch (Admin only)

body.raw:
{
    "batchId": {{batchId}},
    "name": "Monthly Tuition Fee",
    "amount": 5000,
    "frequency": "MONTHLY",
    "dueDay": 5,
    "lateFee": 100,
    "gracePeriod": 7,
    "description": "Regular monthly tuition fee for the batch"
}

request.description:
Create a new fee structure for a batch.

**Frequency options:** MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, SEMI_ANNUAL, ANNUAL, ONE_TIME

**Required fields:**
- batchId: Target batch ID
- name: Fee structure name
- amount: Fee amount
- frequency: Payment frequency
Get all fee structures for a specific batch
Update an existing fee structure
Delete a fee structure

Create a single fee receipt.

**Payment modes:** CASH, UPI, BANK_TRANSFER, CHEQUE, ONLINE

**Status is auto-calculated:**
- PAID: paidAmount >= totalAmount
- PARTIAL: paidAmount > 0 but < totalAmount
- PENDING: paidAmount = 0 and not overdue
- OVERDUE: paidAmount < totalAmount and past due date

Bulk create fee receipts for all students in a batch.

Creates PENDING receipts for each student who doesn't already have a receipt for the specified month/year.

Get all fee receipts with optional filters and pagination.

**Available filters:**
- batchId, studentId
- status (PAID, PARTIAL, PENDING, OVERDUE)
- academicMonth, academicYear
- startDate, endDate
- paymentMode
Get a specific fee receipt by ID with full details
Update a fee receipt. Status is auto-recalculated based on paid amount.
Delete a fee receipt

Get summary statistics for fee receipts.

**Returns:**
- Total, paid, pending, overdue amounts
- Receipt counts by status
- Total receipts count

Get fee summary for a specific student (Admin only).

**Returns:**
- Total due, paid, pending amounts
- Receipt counts (total, paid, pending, overdue)

Get fee receipts for the authenticated student.

**Note:** Requires the authenticated user to have a linked student profile.

Get fee summary for the authenticated student.

**Note:** Requires the authenticated user to have a linked student profile.
Get total number of batches
Get total number of students
Get student count for a specific batch
Get comprehensive dashboard statistics including total students, batches, today's attendance, and monthly growth
Get batch-wise student distribution for pie charts
Get recent enrollments and attendance activities for the activity feed
Get student enrollment trends for the last N months for charts
Get daily attendance trends for the last N days
Get monthly attendance trends for the last N months for charts
Get attendance statistics for a batch on a specific day
Get attendance statistics for a batch for an entire month

item.name: Student App
item.description: Student-facing mobile/portal APIs. All endpoints require student authentication (isStudent middleware).

request.description:
Get the authenticated student's profile including batch information.

**Returns:**
- id, fullname, email, dob, address
- batch: { id, name }

Get student dashboard data including attendance stats and recent activities.

**Returns:**
- attendanceStats: { present, absent, total, percentage }
- upcomingAssignments, recentGrades, announcements

Get today's lecture schedule for the student's batch.

**Returns:**
- Array of lectures with time slots and subjects

Get quick access links and counts for the student.

**Returns:**
- pendingAssignments, unreadAnnouncements, availableResources

Get the student's attendance records with optional month/year filter.

**Returns:**
- Array of attendance records with date, status, time

Mark attendance by scanning QR code (for students).

**Note:** qrData should be the base64-encoded QR payload obtained from scanning the QR code.

**Validation:**
- QR must be valid and not expired
- Student must be enrolled in the batch
- Attendance not already marked for today
- QR code must belong to the student's batch

Get all assignments for the student's batch.

**Returns:**
- Array of assignments with title, description, dueDate, status

Get all announcements for the student's batch.

**Returns:**
- Array of announcements with title, content, createdAt

Get all YouTube videos for the student's batch.

**Returns:**
- Array of videos with id, title, description, url, category

Get all notes for the student's batch.

**Returns:**
- Array of notes with id, title, content (file URLs), category

Get all study materials for the student's batch.

**Returns:**
- Array of materials with id, title, description, files, category

Get all fee receipts for the authenticated student.

**Returns:**
- Array of receipts with receiptNumber, totalAmount, paidAmount, status, dueDate

Get fees summary for the authenticated student.

**Returns:**
- totalDue, totalPaid, totalPending
- receiptCounts: { total, paid, pending, overdue }
